delete_account.title: Delete account
delete_account.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?

edit_username_modal.title: Edit Username
edit_username_modal.username_taken: This username is already in use. Please choose another.
edit_username_modal.username_check_failed: Unable to verify username availability. Please try again.
edit_username_modal.update_failed: Failed to update username. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.not_supported: Notifications are not supported on this device.
notifications.blocked_message: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.

backup.title: Account Backup
backup.never_share: Never share this information. Anyone with it can access your account.
backup.private_key_warning: Warning: This Massa private key cannot be used to restore your Gossip account. Use this only for external wallet compatibility. To restore your Gossip account, you must use the 24-word mnemonic phrase.
backup.show_failed: Failed to show backup information. Please try again.

security.title: Security
security.native_only: Security settings are only available on native platforms (Android and iOS).
security.auto_lock_description: Automatically lock the app after being in the background for a set period of time.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.default_retention_description: New discussions will automatically have this retention policy applied.

web3.title: Web3
web3.mns_description: MNS (Massa Name System) is a decentralized naming service that maps human-readable domain names (like 'alice.massa') to any data like gossip IDs. When enabled, you can use MNS domains to identify and contact other users.
web3.mns_manage: Create and manage your MNS here:
web3.privacy_body: MNS domains link names to your gossip ID and thus to the MNS owner's Massa address. This creates a public association between your identity and blockchain addresses.
web3.trust_body: Resolving MNS domains requires trusting the Massa RPC response. The RPC endpoint could potentially provide incorrect or malicious resolution data.

background_sync.privacy_model_body: Gossip does not use server push notifications. The app syncs in the background when the system allows it. Delivery is not real-time: it depends on your device, battery settings, and whether the app was force-stopped. On iOS, background execution is especially limited.
background_sync.preset_max_description: Checks for new messages every minute. Uses more battery.
background_sync.preset_balanced_description: Checks for new messages every 5 minutes. Saves battery.
background_sync.foreground_description: Keeps sync running even when the app is in the background. Shows a persistent notification. Uses more battery.
background_sync.title: Background Sync
background_sync.ios_limitation: iOS limits background execution to every 15–30 minutes at best. This cannot be changed — it is a system restriction.
background_sync.allow_background_description: If Android restricts background activity, the app stops syncing as soon as it leaves the foreground. Tap to open settings.
background_sync.disable_battery_description: Android's battery optimization can kill the app and delay or drop messages while it is not in the foreground. Tap to open settings and add Gossip to the exceptions.

device_warnings.xiaomi: Xiaomi devices have aggressive battery optimization. To receive messages reliably in the background, please disable battery optimization for Gossip and enable "Autostart" in the MIUI security settings.
device_warnings.huawei: Huawei devices have strict battery management. To receive messages reliably in the background, please disable battery optimization for Gossip and add it to "Protected Apps" in the battery settings.
device_warnings.samsung: Samsung devices may limit background activity. To receive messages reliably, please disable battery optimization and turn off "Put app to sleep" for Gossip.
device_warnings.oneplus: OnePlus devices have battery optimization that may affect background sync. Please disable battery optimization for Gossip.
device_warnings.bbk: This device has battery optimization that may prevent background notifications. Please disable battery optimization and allow background activity for Gossip.
device_warnings.generic: This device may limit background activity. For reliable message notifications, please check your battery optimization settings and allow Gossip to run in the background.

pwa.update_available: New content available, click on reload button to update.
